title: Jorir
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Jorir
CT-43/76-9155 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|II|173|Jorir, Major}} |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Squad Seven (Galactic Republic)|Squad Seven]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Jorir'''"—which meant "to carry" or "to bear" in [[Mando'a/Legends|''Mando'a'']]—was one of the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who were grown on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to serve in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Designated '''CT-43/76-9155''', Jorir and all of his fellow clones were, like Fett, [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|males]] who stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Jorir served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Clone major/Legends|major]] in [[Squad Seven (Galactic Republic)|Squad Seven]], a unit of cross-trained clone specialists created by the [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-class]] [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha]]. While Squad Seven was often led in battle by [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commanders]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]] and [[Davijaan/Legends|Davijaan]], Jorir was responsible for the squad's day-to-day operations. ==Behind the scenes== Jorir was first mentioned in ''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'', an article written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] in [[September]] of [[2005]]. In [[2008]], he received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stm}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Jorir}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-43/76-9155 |es=CT-43/76-9155 }} [[Category:Clone trooper majors]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
